text: Moving from an empty event space to a vibrant exhibition wall, I experience a shift from anticipation to thoughtful engagement. The vacant chairs, once a silent audience, give way to colorful displays that invite interaction and reflection. In this R&D zone, surrounded by innovation and the written word, I feel both inspired by collective curiosity and a bit out of place—caught between observing and participating in the ongoing dialogue between humanity and technology. The air is alive with unspoken questions, and I sense the thrill and subtle apprehension that always comes with facing the new.
